normalization_point: Daedong/TYM can be Stage 2 candidates, but North America farm capex cycle caps Green.
Autonomous agriculture is an option until commercial sales and farmer ROI are verified.
Namhae Chemical/KG Chemical need volume, OPM, FCF, and farmer margin, not fertilizer-price headlines only.
Harim/Maniker/Pamstory-style disease rallies are Stage 1 events and usually Green-blocked.
Feed names need pass-through and volume proof before Stage 3.
Dongwon has global brand value, but StarKist legal settlement is a 4C-watch gate.
KT&G can be Green-eligible only with FCF, returns, and public-health/regulatory stability.
Heated tobacco has repeat-consumption potential, but public-health and marketing-scope gates remain hard.
Medical-quota education trades are Stage 1/2 until repeat enrollment and OPM are verified.
AI education can help, but it can also replace listed education services; treat it as RedTeam-first.
Pinkfong/Samsung Publishing are strong Stage 2 price-path cases but need multi-IP revenue for Stage 3.
Smart farm stays Watch until real orders and unit economics are visible.
Kiosk themes need maintenance/fee revenue, not installation counts only.
R12 headlines stay capped when repeat revenue, unit economics, regulatory scope, or OPM/FCF detail is missing.
